style: Calm low-glare Home Assistant dashboard structure. Three labelled history rails expand into configured panels without drawing invented telemetry.
summary: A structural proof of the current optional Last night dashboard: sleep state, heart rate, and breathing share one previous-night view with Recorder and estimate qualifiers attached.

timeline.action: Hold the hook and three collapsed, labelled history rails with no values or traces.
Expand the configured Sleep state panel and keep Aqara estimate attached.
Expand Heart rate with bpm and measured labels but no trace or value.
Expand Breathing with br/min and measured labels but no trace or value.
Reveal the configured previous-night window and Recorder requirement.
Hold the complete structural proof without ambient motion.
Collapse truth and panels in reverse, then restore all three opening rails.
Hold the exact authored opening state.

constraints: No plotted trace, readout, cursor, or invented personal value.
Keep the SleepRadar logo-and-name lockup static and subordinate to the hook.
Keep Optional dashboard example and the Recorder requirement visible.
Keep measured vitals and estimated sleep stage explicit.
Do not imply the unreleased sessionized summary shown elsewhere.
Animate only transform, opacity, color, backgroundColor, and borderColor.
